rules.labels_overlines: uppercase text-[10px] md:text-xs font-bold tracking-[0.2em] text-zinc-500

typography.installation: Add Outfit and Figtree via Google Fonts or standard imports.

rules.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast standards. Buttons need high contrast text.
rules.gradients: Do not use generic flat gradients. Use radial glows to simulate neon lights.

visual_enhancers.surface_glow: Use drop-shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] for active pins or selected states.
visual_enhancers.textures: Apply a subtle noise/grain overlay (opacity 3-5%) globally to kill digital flatness.

layout_and_spacing.mobile_first_rules: App is mobile-first. Max-width constraints on desktop to simulate mobile (max-w-md mx-auto relative overflow-hidden h-screen).
layout_and_spacing.safe_areas: MUST include pt-[max(env(safe-area-inset-top),3.5rem)] for iPhone Dynamic Island/Notch. pb-[max(env(safe-area-inset-bottom),6rem)] for Home Indicator.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Use generous padding inside cards: p-6 instead of p-4.

grids.bento: For place details, use a dense high-contrast bento grid. grid-cols-2 gap-3.

bottom_navigation.style: Floating glass pill. absolute bottom-8 left-6 right-6 rounded-full glassmorphism flex justify-between items-center px-6 py-4 z-50
bottom_navigation.interaction: Active state has text-primary (#10B981) and subtle scale up.

map_ui.style: Map occupies inset-0 (absolute). UI elements float above it.
map_ui.markers: Custom HTML markers with neon glow. Avoid default map pins. Use user avatar for precise location.

place_cards.style: Image-first design. h-64 w-full rounded-2xl relative overflow-hidden. Text sits at the bottom inside a bg-gradient-to-t from-black/90 to-transparent pt-24 p-5.

navigation_drawer.trigger: A bold CTA 'Get Directions' (bg-primary text-black font-bold pill-shaped)
navigation_drawer.content: A beautiful sheet with 3 large, full-width pill buttons: 'Open in Apple Maps', 'Open in Google Maps', 'Open in Waze'.

shuffle_cards.style: Tinder-like discovery stack. absolute inset-x-4 top-24 bottom-32.
shuffle_cards.motion: Use framer-motion drag='x' with useTransform for rotation based on swipe position.

motion.page_transitions: Animate Presence with slight opacity fade and y-axis slide (20px).
motion.micro_interactions: Tap states on cards and buttons: active:scale-95 transition-transform duration-200.
motion.drawers: Smooth, heavy-spring feeling when Drawer slides up.

accessibility.testing: All interactive elements must have data-testid. Examples: data-testid='nav-home', data-testid='btn-waze-directions', data-testid='shuffle-card-swipe'.

icons.style: Use Duotone weight for a premium, dual-color glow effect (primary color + white).

images.description: Modern retail store interior with display cases and lighting.
Retail store interior with display cases and shelves.
people sitting inside building with red neon signage
red and green Open Late Cocktails neon sign

instructions_to_main_agent: You are building a mobile-first PWA. Center the main App layout to simulate a mobile screen on desktop (max-w-md mx-auto shadow-2xl overflow-hidden h-screen bg-[#09090B] relative).
Install dependencies: framer-motion, @phosphor-icons/react, lucide-react (if shadcn needs it).
Use Shadcn components (Drawer, Button, Card, Tabs, Sheet) but strip default Vercel aesthetic. Override borders with border-white/10 and backgrounds with bg-[#18181B].

Build a mocked Map background for the Home view. It should look like a dark mode map. If you can't integrate a real map easily, use a placeholder map div with dark grid lines, glowing markers (absolute positions).
The Bottom Navigation should be absolute positioned at bottom-8 left-6 right-6 (NOT fixed to the bottom edge). Use glassmorphism.
Implement the 'Get Directions' Drawer: When clicked on a place, open Drawer. Inside, list 3 branded buttons (Google Maps, Waze, Apple Maps).
Implement Tinder-like 'Shuffle' view using Framer Motion (drag='x').
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for text-heavy overlays. Always use at least bg-black/60 with backdrop-blur-xl.
Do NOT use HTML <input type='date'> or <select>. Stick to Shadcn UI.
All JS files (App.jsx, components). DO NOT use TypeScript (.tsx), keep it to React .js/.jsx.
Remember to include safe-area paddings for dynamic island!
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid 'AI slop' aesthetic. Make it premium, night-club/urban exploration vibe.
Never use dark colors as gradients. Use solid dark backgrounds.
Do not center align paragraphs or lists. Only center align headers/hero if it adds tension.
Create depth with layered elements and z-index.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
Always use modern pill-shaped or sharp rounded buttons.
DO NOT use emojis for icons. Use @phosphor-icons/react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations. Static = dead.
